mapper.select: SELECT o.order_no, p.product_name, o.order_status, o.order_deadline, mr.employee_id FROM orders o JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN matching_record mr ON o.order_id = mr.order_id AND mr.matching_status = 'CONFIRM' WHERE o.order_deadline <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND o.order_status != 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY o.order_deadline ASC
